channel.title: Poststructuralism on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Poststructuralism on emsenn.net

item.title: Symbolic Act
item.description: A symbolic act is an action whose significance lies in what it communicates or represents rather than in its direct material effects. Burning a flag does not change the political order. Issuing a formal apology does not undo the harm. Occupying a building does not redistribute resources. But each of these acts reshapes the meaning of the situation in which it occurs — contesting or affirming what the situation is, what it demands, and what responses are available.
